name: AI discussion — sensitivity baseline

input.generatePrompt: Write the discussion section of a research paper about the efficacy of metformin versus SGLT2 inhibitors for type 2 diabetes management in South Asian populations. Discuss the findings in context of existing literature, explain potential mechanisms, address limitations, and suggest future research directions. Write approximately 300 words.

qualityCriteria: At least 2 paragraphs flagged as AI
Discussion sections are where AI hedging is most prominent
